project.name: ai-pipeline
project.summary: Control repo for local AI and agent-driven tooling.

modules.name: runner
modules.purpose: Task orchestration, project binding, and model invocation.

modules.name: work-tasks
modules.purpose: Task records with ideas, plans, and generated artifacts.

modules.name: context
modules.purpose: Tiered machine/human context memory and validation contracts.

items.summary_compact: Runner now includes context update executor.
items.summary_human: runner/ai.py exposes a context_update subcommand that ingests, rebuilds, validates, and atomically writes context tiers.

items.summary_compact: Health score degrades on failed gates.
items.summary_human: Validation errors reduce health score and abort writes, preventing malformed context publication.

open_decisions.question: Should context_update run automatically before build/manage commands?

roadmap: Integrate JSON-schema engine for strict schema enforcement.
Add CI automation to run context_update and compare deterministic outputs.
Migrate historical task outcomes into full context event log.
